'''Kerestese''' was the native language of the [[Kerestian/Legends|Kerestian]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kerest/Legends|Kerest]]. Most Kerestians were fluent in both Kerestese and [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], although only literate in their own [[Language/Legends|language]]. An intricate language in both its oral and written form, Kerestese was rich in rules and exceptions to those rules.<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology" />

{{Language-stub}}

==Glossary of terms==
*''Verre'' - swear word
*''Verre d'n Nocka'' - vehement curse

*<!-- 1997-07-XX -->''[[Secrets of the Sisar Run]]''
